channel.title: Web-Scraping on Junho Lee
channel.description: Recent content in Web-Scraping on Junho Lee

item.title: 10. Spider 72%: The Dataset, Not the Model, Shapes the Error Profile
item.description: Switching to Pro actually dropped accuracy by 8%p. I categorized 19 errors into 6 types and ran the same pipeline on Spider. The distributions were completely different. DB characteristics determine the error profile more than the model does.
